sources.title: github/awesome-copilot examples
sources.whyItMatters: Useful for concrete file-level examples of prompts, agents, instructions, and skills when treated as illustrative rather than normative.

sources.title: microsoft/vscode Copilot customization examples
sources.whyItMatters: Shows how platform-adjacent teams separate reusable entrypoints from methodology and use narrow roles.

sources.title: PowerShell and other public repos with Copilot assets
sources.whyItMatters: Confirms repeated patterns across real projects: small always-on instructions, scoped files, and workflow packaging in skills.
